overview: Comprehensive sexual health clinic offering STI testing, HIV prevention (PEP/PrEP), contraception counseling, and sexual health counseling services.
highlights: STI testing with 98% accuracy rate and same-day results
PEP and PrEP medications for HIV prevention
Full range of contraception options with personalized counseling
targetAudience: Individuals seeking confidential sexual health services and education across all orientations and backgrounds.
